signals.title: AUD/USD — Middle East Tensions + Positio
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7146 — Middle East escalation drives risk-off; AUD/USD COT LF net long +47,218 (crowded long). 335bp AUD carry advantage over JPY fades in risk-off. Watch for safe-haven flows into USD and JPY; 0.7200 is the next resistance level.

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: CAD leads G8 (+0.451% avg, 3 pairs) while EUR lags (-0.478% avg, 7 pairs); CAD/EUR spread 0.928%. BoC 2.25% vs ECB 2.0% — 25bp CAD carry advantage supports CAD. Watch for EUR/USD testing 1.1700.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1710 — COT LF net short -8,352; HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV 9.4%. Positioning stalling, vol rising — late-trend caution. Watch for LF delta turning positive or IV spike.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; GBP/USD at 1.3515 mid-range. GBP LF net long +33,517; AM constructive. Watch 1.3600 as next resistance.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.56 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short -80,578; carry dominates until VIX > 25.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −18,062 vs RBNZ hike bias (40% priced for 27 May). Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers or signals hike; NZD/USD at 0.5872. Carry advantage favors NZD with RBNZ 2.25% vs SNB 0% — 225bp.
